excerpt: A frustrated cop pursues a maniacal hunchback, a one-handed bank robber and others in his quest to take down a crime kingpin in Rome.
title: The Tough Ones

excerpt: A smooth-talking parasite hooks a young man on a hallucinogenic secretion but demands fresh human brains as sustenance.
title: Brain Damage

excerpt: After a compromised teleportation experiment, a scientist’s body and humanity putrefy as he slowly mutates into a humanoid-fly hybrid.
title: The Fly

excerpt: A ronin plays both sides of a town’s gang war.
title: Yojimbo

excerpt: After their last male general falls in battle, the surviving women of a family devoted to defending the Song Empire raise an army and set out to battle the invading forces.
title: The 14 Amazons
